metadata.short_desc: Subscribe to RSS feeds and get updates pushed to chat
metadata.desc: RSS subscription plugin - subscribe to blogs, news, and tech articles. Auto-check for updates and push new content to your chat window.

default_interval.hint: Default polling interval for new RSS subscriptions, range 5-1440 minutes (1 day)

max_entries_per_push.hint: Maximum number of new entries to push at once, to avoid spamming
